channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Avant même sa sortie officielle, la classique Neo Geo AES Plus est déjà en promotion pendant les French Days
item.description: SNK et Plaion se sont alliés pour sortir une version modernisée de la Neo Geo AES Plus. Pour la découvrir, il faudra attendre le mois de novembre 2026. Toutefois, elle est déjà en promotion chez Amazon.

item.title: Jaecoo, qui est ce nouveau constructeur Chinois qui a vendu 922 SUV dès son premier mois en France
item.description: Totalement méconnu il y a six mois encore, Jaecoo a réussi à rapidement s’imposer sur le marché français. Mais qui est vraiment cette marque chinoise, qui commercialise des voitures électriques et hybrides ?

item.title: Therabody Promo Codes: 15% Off May 2026
item.description: Save on the science-backed devices you’ve been eyeing with 15% off Theragun discount code and 30% off other great deals.

item.title: 30% Off Canon Promo Codes | May 2026
item.description: Save an extra 10% or 30% with Canon coupon codes, plus up to $1,600 on cameras, printers, and more this May.

item.title: Surfshark Promo Codes: 87% Off | May 2026
item.description: Save up to 87% with a Surfshark coupon code, 3 months of VPN free today, and more from WIRED.

item.title: 20% Off Brooks Promo Code & Deals for | May 2026
item.description: Enjoy 20% off your first order with a Brooks coupon code, plus top discounts and deals on our favorite Brooks running shoes.

item.title: Columbia Promo Codes: 15% Off | May2026
item.description: Explore current Columbia deals on jackets, outdoor gear, and apparel. Find active Columbia promo codes, student discounts, and free shipping offers to save on your next adventure.

item.title: Newegg Promo Code: 10% Off in May 2026
item.description: Enjoy up to 10% off your entire order with today’s Newegg promo code and discount codes. Save with the latest deals for gaming PCs, laptops, and computer parts.

item.title: 30% VistaPrint Coupon & Promo Codes | May 2026
item.description: From personalized gifts to business essentials, WIRED can help you save with our selection of VistaPrint promo codes.

item.title: Sony Coupons: 45% Off Sony Headphones, WF-1000XM6 Earbuds, and Sony Cameras for May
item.description: Upgrade your setup with Sony’s newest releases. Save on industry-leading noise-canceling audio, and pro-level Alpha cameras.

item.title: Hate your job, but can’t quit? Try this
item.description: More than half of workers are job hunting despite doubts about the market. Instead of jumping ship, there’s another path. At one point or another, most of us have stared at our computer screen and wondered: Is this it? For some, it’s a passing feeling. Yet, for others, that boredom turns into lingering dissatisfaction, leading to quiet quitting, or even walking away from a job entirely, which rarely solves the deeper problem. New data from Gallup shows that while only 30% of workers think it’s a good time to find a new job, more than half are actively looking anyway. ...
